signature_abilities.name: Back Blasphemer!
signature_abilities.flavor: You channel power through your weapon to repel foes.

signature_abilities.name: Every Step ... Death!
signature_abilities.effect: Each time the target willingly moves before the end of your next turn, they take 1 psychic damage for each square they move.
signature_abilities.flavor: You show your foe a glimpse of their fate after death.

signature_abilities.name: Halt Miscreant!
signature_abilities.tier1: 2 + M holy damage; P < weak, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.tier2: 5 + M holy damage; P < average, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.tier3: 7 + M holy damage; P < strong, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.flavor: You infuse your weapon with holy magic that makes it difficult for your foe to get away.

signature_abilities.name: Your Allies Cannot Save You!
signature_abilities.effect: Each enemy adjacent to the target is pushed away from the target up to a number of squares equal to your Presence score.
signature_abilities.flavor: Your magic strike turns your foe's guilt into a burst of holy power.

heroic_abilities.name: Behold a Shield of Faith!
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, enemies take a bane on ability rolls made against you or any ally adjacent to you.

heroic_abilities.name: Driving Assault
heroic_abilities.effect: You can shift up to your speed in a straight line toward the target after pushing them.

heroic_abilities.name: The Gods Punish and Defend
heroic_abilities.effect: You can spend a Recovery to allow yourself or one ally within 10 squares to regain Stamina equal to your recovery value.

heroic_abilities.name: Repent!
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + P holy damage; I < weak, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 8 + P holy damage; I < average, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 11 + P holy damage; I < strong, dazed (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Arrest
heroic_abilities.effect: If the target makes a strike against a creature while grabbed this way, you can spend 3 wrath to deal holy damage to them equal to your Presence score, then change the target of the strike to another target within the strike's distance.

heroic_abilities.name: Behold the Face of Justice!
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + M holy damage; if the target has P < weak, each enemy within 2 squares of them is frightened of you (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + M holy damage; if the target has P < average, each enemy within 2 squares of them is frightened of you (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 8 + M holy damage; if the target has P < strong, each enemy within 2 squares of them is frightened of you (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: Each enemy frightened this way is pushed up to 2 squares away from the target and takes psychic damage equal to your Presence score.

heroic_abilities.name: Censored
heroic_abilities.effect: When a target who is not a leader or solo creature is made winded by this ability, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.

heroic_abilities.name: Purifying Fire
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + M holy damage; M < weak, the target has fire weakness 3 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + M holy damage; M < average, the target has fire weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 12 + M holy damage; M < strong, the target has fire weakness 7 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While the target has fire weakness from this ability, you can choose to have your abilities deal fire damage to the target instead of holy damage.

heroic_abilities.name: It Is Justice You Fear
heroic_abilities.tier1: 8 + M holy damage; P < weak, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 12 + M holy damage; P < average, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 15 + M holy damage; P < strong, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: If the target is already frightened of you or another creature and this ability would frighten them again, they instead take psychic damage equal to twice your Presence score.

heroic_abilities.name: Revelator
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target takes holy damage equal to twice your Presence score. Additionally, each hidden target is automatically revealed and can't become hidden again until the start of your next turn. You can then use your Judgment ability against one target as a free triggered action.

heroic_abilities.name: Prescient Grace
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: An enemy within 10 squares starts their turn. Effect: You can spend a Recovery to allow the target to regain Stamina equal to your recovery value. The target can then take their turn immediately before the triggering enemy.

heroic_abilities.name: With My Blessing
heroic_abilities.effect: The target can use a free triggered action to use a strike signature ability or a strike heroic ability, and has a double edge on that ability. If a heroic ability is chosen, reduce its Heroic Resource cost by 3 (to a minimum cost of 0).

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of the Faithful
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each target gains 1 surge at the end of each of your turns.

heroic_abilities.name: Sentenced
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + P damage; P < weak, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + P damage; P < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 12 + P damage; P < strong, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While the target is restrained this way, your abilities that impose forced movement can still move them.

heroic_abilities.name: Edict of Disruptive Isolation
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each target takes holy damage equal to your Presence score at the end of each of your turns. A target takes an extra 2d6 holy damage if they are judged by you or if they are adjacent to any enemy.

heroic_abilities.name: Edict of Perfect Order
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, whenever a target uses an ability that costs Malice, they take holy damage equal to three times your Presence score. A target judged by you takes an extra 2d6 holy damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Edict of Purifying Pacifism
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, whenever a target makes a strike, they take holy damage equal to twice your Presence score. A target judged by you takes an extra 2d6 holy damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Edict of Stillness
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, whenever a target moves or is force moved out of the area, they take holy damage equal to twice your Presence score. A target judged by you who moves willingly takes an extra 2d6 holy damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Gods Grant Thee Strength
heroic_abilities.effect: The target ends any condition or effect on them that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn, or a prone target can stand up. The target then gains 2 surges, can shift up to their speed while ignoring difficult terrain, and can use a strike signature ability as a free triggered action.

heroic_abilities.name: Orison of Victory
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: A target can end one effect on them that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn, or a prone target can stand up.

heroic_abilities.name: Righteous Judgment
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, whenever any ally deals damage to a target judged by you, that ally gains 1 surge.

heroic_abilities.name: Shield of the Righteous
heroic_abilities.tier1: 10 + M damage; you and each ally adjacent to you gain 10 temporary Stamina
heroic_abilities.tier2: 14 + M damage; you and each ally adjacent to you gain 15 temporary Stamina
heroic_abilities.tier3: 20 + M damage; you and each ally adjacent to you gain 20 temporary Stamina

heroic_abilities.name: Pain of Your Own Making
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: The target gains a condition or effect that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn. Effect: The effect ends on the target and is applied to the creature who imposed the effect on them. That creature also takes damage equal to three times your Presence score.

heroic_abilities.name: Edict of Peace
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, whenever any target takes a triggered action or a free triggered action, that action is negated and the target takes holy damage equal to your Presence score.

heroic_abilities.name: Congregation
heroic_abilities.tier1: 8 + M damage; as a free triggered action, one ally within 10 squares of the target can use a strike signature ability against the target
heroic_abilities.tier2: 12 + M damage; as a free triggered action, one ally within 10 squares of the target can use a strike signature ability that gains an edge against the target
heroic_abilities.tier3: 16 + M damage; as a free triggered action, two allies within 10 squares of the target can each use a strike signature ability that gains an edge against the target
heroic_abilities.effect: Each ally can shift up to 2 squares and gains 2 surges before making the strike.

heroic_abilities.name: Intercede
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: A creature makes a strike against the target. Effect: The target is unaffected by the strike and you become the target instead, even if you aren't a valid target for it. You take half the damage from the strike, and the target gains 3 surges.

heroic_abilities.name: Excommunication
heroic_abilities.tier1: 9 + M damage; I < weak, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 13 + M damage; I < average, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 18 + M damage; I < strong, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: At the end of each of your turns, a target weakened this way deals holy damage equal to twice your Presence score to each enemy within 2 squares of them. Additionally, a target weakened this way can't be targeted by their allies' abilities.

heroic_abilities.name: Hand of the Gods
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, while the target is judged by you, you can choose to make them the source of any of your abilities. Additionally, the target counts as an ally for the purpose of flanking.

heroic_abilities.name: Pillar of Holy Fire
heroic_abilities.tier1: 9 + M damage; I < weak, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 13 + M damage; I < average, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 18 + M damage; I < strong, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: At the end of each of your turns, a target dazed this way deals holy damage equal to twice your Presence score to each enemy within 2 squares of them.

heroic_abilities.name: Your Allies Turn on You!
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + P damage; I < weak, slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + P damage; I < average, slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 12 + P damage; I < strong, slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While the target is slowed this way, each of their allies who starts their turn within 5 squares of them must use a free maneuver to make a free strike against the target. Additionally, while the target is slowed this way, each of their allies within 5 squares of them who can make a triggered free strike against a different creature must make the free strike against the target instead.

heroic_abilities.name: Banish
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + M damage; P < weak, the target is banished (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 8 + M damage; P < average, the target is banished (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 11 + M damage; P < strong, the target is banished (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: This ability gains an edge against demons, devils, undead, and creatures not native to your current world. If you know the target's true name, this ability has a double edge. While banished, the target is sent to another manifold in the timescape and removed from the encounter map. A banished target can do nothing but make saving throws, and takes 10 holy damage each time they do so. If the target is reduced to 0 Stamina while banished, they are lost to the timescape.

heroic_abilities.name: Terror Manifest
heroic_abilities.tier1: 7 + P psychic damage; P < weak, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 + P psychic damage; P < average, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 + P psychic damage; P < strong, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While frightened this way, if a target who is a leader or solo creature is winded, they take an extra 25 psychic damage. If a target frightened this way is not a leader or solo creature and is winded, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing and a Curse
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: The target makes a power roll. Effect: The target obtains a tier 1 or tier 3 outcome on their power roll (your choice). You can then choose another target within distance, who obtains the opposite outcome on their next power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Fulfill Your Destiny
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: You or another hero ends their turn. Effect: The target takes their turn after the triggering hero, and immediately removes all conditions and negative effects on themself. During their turn, the target has a double edge on power rolls.

heroic_abilities.name: Apostate
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, the target has damage weakness 10.

heroic_abilities.name: Edict of Unyielding Resolve
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each target who starts their turn in the area gains 10 temporary Stamina.

signature_abilities.name: Blessed Light
signature_abilities.effect: One ally within distance gains a number of surges equal to the tier outcome of your power roll.

signature_abilities.name: Drain
signature_abilities.effect: You or one ally within distance can spend a Recovery.

signature_abilities.name: Lightfall
signature_abilities.effect: You can teleport yourself and each ally in the area to unoccupied spaces in the area.

signature_abilities.name: Sacrificial Offer
signature_abilities.effect: Choose yourself or one ally within distance. That character can impose a bane on one power roll made against them before the end of their next turn.

signature_abilities.name: Warrior's Prayer
signature_abilities.effect: You or one ally within distance gains temporary Stamina equal to your Intuition score.

signature_abilities.name: Wither
signature_abilities.tier1: 3 + I corruption damage; P < weak, the target takes a bane on their next power roll
signature_abilities.tier2: 5 + I corruption damage; P < average, the target takes a bane on their next power roll
signature_abilities.tier3: 8 + I corruption damage; P < strong, the target takes a bane on their next power roll

heroic_abilities.name: Call the Thunder Down
heroic_abilities.effect: You can push each willing ally in the area the same distance, ignoring stability.

heroic_abilities.name: Font of Wrath
heroic_abilities.effect: You summon a spirit of size 2 who can't be harmed, and who appears in an unoccupied space within distance. The spirit lasts until the end of your next turn. You and your allies can move through the spirit's space, but enemies can't. Any enemy who moves within 2 squares of the spirit for the first time in a combat round or starts their turn there takes holy damage equal to your Intuition score.

heroic_abilities.name: Judgment's Hammer
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + I holy damage; A < weak, prone
heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + I holy damage; A < average, prone
heroic_abilities.tier3: 9 + I holy damage; A < strong, prone and can't stand (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Violence Will Not Aid Thee
heroic_abilities.effect: The first time on a turn that the target deals damage to another creature, the target of this ability takes 1d10 lightning damage (save ends).

heroic_abilities.name: Corruption's Curse
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + I corruption damage; M < weak, damage weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + I corruption damage; M < average, damage weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 9 + I corruption damage; M < strong, damage weakness 5 (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Curse of Terror
heroic_abilities.tier1: 6 + I holy damage; I < weak, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + I holy damage; I < average, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 + I holy damage; I < strong, frightened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Faith Is Our Armor
heroic_abilities.effect: You can target yourself instead of one ally with this ability.

heroic_abilities.name: Sermon of Grace
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can spend a Recovery. Additionally, each target can use a free triggered action to end one effect on them that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn, or to stand up if prone.

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of Fate and Destiny
heroic_abilities.effect: You can target yourself instead of one creature. Choose one effect (lasts until end of encounter or dying): Whenever a target makes a power roll, they can roll three dice and choose which two rolls to use; OR Whenever a target makes a power roll, they must roll three dice and use the lowest two rolls.

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of Insight
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each target gains 1 surge at the end of each of your turns.

heroic_abilities.name: Divine Comedy
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can choose another creature in the area, then swap places with that creature. The creature they choose must be able to fit into the space they leave and vice versa.

heroic_abilities.name: The Gods Command You Obey
heroic_abilities.tier1: 4 + I holy damage; P < weak, before taking damage, the target makes a free strike against a target you choose
heroic_abilities.tier2: 7 + I holy damage; P < average, before taking damage, the target uses an ability of your choice and you choose any targets for that ability
heroic_abilities.tier3: 11 + I holy damage; P < strong, before taking damage, the target shifts up to their speed to a location you choose, uses an ability of your choice, and you choose any targets for that ability

heroic_abilities.name: Morning Light
heroic_abilities.effect: Each ally in the area deals fire damage equal to your Intuition score with their next strike made before the end of their next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Our Hearts Your Strength
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until the target is dying, at the start of each of the target's turns, they gain a bonus to speed and a bonus to rolled damage equal to the number of allies within 10 squares of them. This bonus lasts until the start of their next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Reap
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a target kills an enemy, they regain Stamina equal to 5 + your Intuition score.

heroic_abilities.name: Sacred Bond
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, whenever one target takes damage, the other target can use a free triggered action to take the damage instead. The original target suffers any effects associated with the damage. Additionally, whenever one target spends a Recovery, the other target can use a free triggered action to spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Statue of Power
heroic_abilities.effect: A size 2 statue rises out of the ground in an unoccupied space within distance and lasts until the end of the encounter. While within 3 squares of the statue, you gain 1 surge at the start of each of your turns. Each ally within 3 squares of the statue gains this same benefit. The statue is destroyed if it takes 20 or more damage. It has immunity all to poison and psychic damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Wellspring of Grace
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, whenever a target starts their turn in the area, they can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Fear of the Gods
heroic_abilities.tier1: 6 psychic damage; I < weak, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 psychic damage; I < average, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 psychic damage; I < strong, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target is frightened of you or a creature you choose within distance.

heroic_abilities.name: Saint's Raiment
heroic_abilities.effect: The target gains 20 temporary Stamina and 3 surges.

heroic_abilities.name: Soul Siphon
heroic_abilities.effect: One ally within distance can spend any number of Recoveries.

heroic_abilities.name: Words of Wrath and Grace
heroic_abilities.effect: Each ally in the area can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Beacon of Grace
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, whenever you or any ally damages the target using an ability, that creature can spend a Recovery. If the target is reduced to 0 Stamina before the end of the encounter, you can use a free triggered action to move this effect to another creature within distance.

heroic_abilities.name: Penance
heroic_abilities.tier1: 4 corruption damage; I < weak, prone and can't stand (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 7 corruption damage; I < average, prone and can't stand (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 11 corruption damage; I < strong, prone and can't stand (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Sanctuary
heroic_abilities.effect: The target is removed from the encounter map until the start of their next turn and can spend any number of Recoveries. At the start of their turn, the target reappears in the space they left or the nearest unoccupied space of their choice.

heroic_abilities.name: Vessel of Retribution
heroic_abilities.effect: The first time the target is dying or winded before the end of the encounter, each enemy within 5 squares of them takes 15 holy damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Blade of the Heavens
heroic_abilities.tier1: 8 + I damage; A < weak, prone and restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 12 + I damage; A < average, prone and restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 16 + I damage; A < strong, prone and restrained (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of the Midday Sun
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each creature in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each enemy in the area takes a bane on power rolls, and you and each ally in the area gain 1 surge at the end of each of your turns.

heroic_abilities.name: Cuirass of the Gods
heroic_abilities.effect: You can target yourself instead of one creature. Each target has damage immunity 5 until the start of your next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Gods' Machine
heroic_abilities.effect: You conjure a size 2 rolling machine (50 Stamina, immunity all to poison/psychic). Disappears at end of encounter, 0 Stamina, or if dying. When first appears, power roll targets each adjacent enemy. Once per subsequent turn, free maneuver to move it up to Intuition score squares then repeat power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Aura of Souls
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, at the end of each of your turns, you can slide each creature in the area up to a number of squares equal to your Intuition score. This forced movement ignores stability for your allies.

heroic_abilities.name: Invocation of Undoing
heroic_abilities.effect: You can choose to have this ability deal damage to and push objects, and to deal damage to buildings.

heroic_abilities.name: Lauded by God
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target gains 3 of their Heroic Resource.

heroic_abilities.name: Lightning Lord
heroic_abilities.effect: The targets are force moved one at a time, starting with the target nearest to you, and can be pushed into other targets in the same line.

heroic_abilities.name: Revitalizing Grace
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can spend any number of Recoveries. Additionally, each target can end one effect on themself that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn, or they can stand up if prone.

heroic_abilities.name: Spirit Stampede
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 damage; M < weak, prone and can't stand (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 8 damage; M < average, prone and can't stand (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 11 damage; M < strong, prone and can't stand (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Your Story Ends Here
heroic_abilities.tier1: 9 + I corruption damage; R < weak, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 14 + I corruption damage; R < average, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 19 + I corruption damage; R < strong, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: If this damage kills the target, you and each ally within distance can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Invocation of Mystery
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target is invisible until the start of your next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Arise!
heroic_abilities.effect: The target can spend any number of Recoveries, can end any effects on them that are ended by a saving throw or that end at the end of their turn, and can stand up if they are prone. Additionally, at the start of each of their turns until the end of the encounter or until they are dying, the target gains 3 surges.

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of Steel
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, any ability roll made against a target takes a bane and each target has damage immunity 5.

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of the Blade
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: At the end of each of your turns until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each target gains 3 surges.

heroic_abilities.name: Drag the Unworthy
heroic_abilities.effect: Each ally the target comes adjacent to during the forced movement can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Divine Dragon
heroic_abilities.effect: Conjure a size 4 dragon (speed 6, fly, stability 4, 100 Stamina, fire immunity). Uses your characteristics. Main action: breathe fire in 3 cube. Maneuver: move dragon or claw attack.

heroic_abilities.name: Word of Final Redemption
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: The target dies. Effect: Before the target dies, you can look at their stat block and force them to use one ability that is a main action or a maneuver. If the ability costs a Heroic Resource or Malice, the creature can use it without any cost. Your allies and enemies are the target's allies and enemies, and you decide who the ability targets.

heroic_abilities.name: Bend Fate
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, each of the target's power rolls has its outcome improved by one tier.

heroic_abilities.name: Word of Weakening
heroic_abilities.tier1: 10 + I corruption damage; A < weak, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 15 + I corruption damage; A < average, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 21 + I corruption damage; A < strong, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While weakened this way, the target has damage weakness 10.

heroic_abilities.name: Radiance of Grace
heroic_abilities.effect: You can target yourself instead of one ally. Each target can spend any number of Recoveries, can end any effects on them that are ended by a saving throw or that end at the end of their turn, and can stand up if they are prone.

heroic_abilities.name: Alacrity of the Heart
heroic_abilities.effect: The target has an additional main action they can use on their next turn, and gains 3 of their Heroic Resource.

heroic_abilities.name: Thorn Cage
heroic_abilities.tier1: 10 + I damage; A < weak, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 15 + I damage; A < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 21 + I damage; A < strong, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While restrained this way, the target takes 10 damage at the start of each of your turns.

heroic_abilities.name: Blessing of the Fortress
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, no enemy can approach within 5 squares of you by moving or by being force moved by any enemy. Targets can be force moved closer to you by you or your allies, or can move closer because of your movement.

heroic_abilities.name: Godstorm
heroic_abilities.effect: A raging storm fills the area until the end of the encounter or until you are dying. At the start of each of your turns, you can move the storm up to 5 squares (no action required). On subsequent turns while the storm is active, you can use a maneuver to make its power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Night Falls
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, the area is filled with magic darkness that your enemies can't see through, but you and your allies can.

heroic_abilities.name: Righteous Phalanx
heroic_abilities.effect: The wall lasts until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, and can be placed in occupied squares. Creatures can enter and pass through the wall. Each enemy who enters the area for the first time in a combat round or starts their turn there takes 15 damage.

signature_abilities.name: Afflict a Bountiful Decay
signature_abilities.effect: Choose yourself or one ally within distance. That character can end one effect on them that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn.

signature_abilities.name: Grasp of Beyond
signature_abilities.effect: You can teleport up to a number of squares equal to your Reason score.

signature_abilities.name: The Green Within, the Green Without
signature_abilities.effect: You slide one creature within 10 squares of the target up to 2 squares.

signature_abilities.name: Ray of Agonizing Self-Reflection
signature_abilities.tier1: 2 + R corruption damage; R < weak, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.tier2: 4 + R corruption damage; R < average, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.tier3: 6 + R corruption damage; R < strong, slowed (save ends)

signature_abilities.name: Unquiet Ground
signature_abilities.effect: The ground beneath the area is difficult terrain for enemies.

heroic_abilities.name: Behold the Mystery
heroic_abilities.effect: Persistent 1: At the start of your turn, you can use a maneuver to use this ability again without spending essence.

heroic_abilities.name: The Flesh, a Crucible
heroic_abilities.effect: Persistent 1: If the target is within distance at the start of your turn, you can make the power roll again without spending essence (no action required).

heroic_abilities.name: Invigorating Growth
heroic_abilities.effect: Mushrooms cover the target's body. While the mushrooms are on the target, you and any ally adjacent to the target gain 1 surge whenever the target takes damage. The mushrooms can be removed by the target or an adjacent creature as a main action.

heroic_abilities.name: Ripples in the Earth
heroic_abilities.effect: You must be touching the ground. You can choose a square of ground in the area that is unoccupied or occupied by you or any ally. A pillar of earth rises out of the ground, with a height up to your Reason score.

heroic_abilities.name: Conflagration
heroic_abilities.effect: Persistent 2: At the start of your turn, you can use a maneuver to use this ability again without spending essence.

heroic_abilities.name: Instantaneous Excavation
heroic_abilities.tier1: The target can shift 1 square from the edge of the hole.
heroic_abilities.tier2: The target falls into the hole.
heroic_abilities.tier3: The target falls into the hole and can't reduce the height of the fall.
heroic_abilities.effect: You open up two holes with 1-square openings that are 4 squares deep. Persistent 1: open another hole without spending essence.

heroic_abilities.name: No More Than a Breeze
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target can move through solid matter, they ignore difficult terrain, and their movement can't provoke opportunity attacks. Persistent 1: The effect lasts until the start of your next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Test of Rain
heroic_abilities.effect: You can end one effect on yourself that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of your turn. Each ally in the area also gains this benefit.

heroic_abilities.name: O Flower Aid, O Earth Defend
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn: free maneuver to allow self and allies in area to spend Recoveries; area is difficult terrain for enemies; enemies entering area take damage equal to Reason score. Persistent 1.

heroic_abilities.name: Subvert the Green Within
heroic_abilities.effect: The target uses their signature ability against a creature of your choice. Then make a power roll against the target.

heroic_abilities.name: Translated Through Flame
heroic_abilities.effect: The target is teleported to another space within distance. Power roll affects each enemy adjacent to the target's new space.

heroic_abilities.name: Volcano's Embrace
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + R fire damage; A < weak, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + R fire damage; A < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 12 + R fire damage; A < strong, restrained (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Erase
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target begins to fade from existence (save ends). On first turn: bane on power rolls. End of first turn: double bane. End of second turn: fade from existence for 1 hour.

heroic_abilities.name: Maw of Earth
heroic_abilities.effect: The ground in or directly beneath the area drops 3 squares.

heroic_abilities.name: Swarm of Spirits
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of your next turn, each ally in the area has characteristic scores treated as 1 higher for resisting potencies, and has a +1 bonus to saving throws. Persistent 1.

heroic_abilities.name: Wall of Fire
heroic_abilities.effect: Wall lasts until start of next turn. Each enemy who enters or starts their turn there takes fire damage equal to Reason score for each square. Persistent 1: wall lasts until start of next turn, add squares equal to Reason score.

heroic_abilities.name: Combustion Deferred
heroic_abilities.effect: When the target ends their next turn, or if they drop to 0 Stamina before then, each enemy adjacent to them takes fire damage equal to twice your Reason score. Each affected enemy then gains this same effect.

heroic_abilities.name: Storm of Sands
heroic_abilities.effect: Difficult terrain for enemies, concealment for you and allies. Persistent 1: area remains, move up to 5 squares, maneuver to repeat power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Subverted Perception of Space
heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 + R corruption damage; the target has line of effect only to creatures and objects within 4 squares until start of your next turn
heroic_abilities.tier3: 15 + R corruption damage; the target has line of effect only to adjacent creatures and objects until start of your next turn
heroic_abilities.effect: Persistent 1: The target's limited line of effect lasts until the start of your next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Web of All That's Come Before
heroic_abilities.tier1: 2 corruption damage; A < weak, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 3 corruption damage; A < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 5 corruption damage; A < strong, restrained (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Luminous Champion Aloft

heroic_abilities.name: Magma Titan

heroic_abilities.tier1: Teleport the target up to 4 squares.
heroic_abilities.tier2: Teleport the target up to 6 squares.
heroic_abilities.tier3: Teleport the target up to 8 squares.
heroic_abilities.effect: If teleported to a space where they would fall, they fall treating Agility as 0. Takes fire damage from fall, enemies within 3 squares take same fire damage. Ground within 3 squares is difficult terrain.

heroic_abilities.name: The Wode Remembers and Returns
heroic_abilities.effect: Trees and plant life appear. Difficult terrain for enemies, allies who end turn in area have cover. Persistent 2: area remains, allies can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Heart of the Wode

heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 fire damage; the Director loses 3 Malice
heroic_abilities.tier3: 15 fire damage; the Director loses 4 Malice
heroic_abilities.effect: The Director's Malice can become negative as a result of this ability.

heroic_abilities.name: Return to Oblivion
heroic_abilities.effect: Create a size 1L vortex that lasts until end of encounter. Start of each combat round: vertical pulls 3 each enemy within 5 squares. Enemies entering or starting turn there are knocked prone. End of round: winded non-leader/solo enemy in vortex is instantly destroyed.

heroic_abilities.name: World Torn Asunder

heroic_abilities.name: Earth Rejects You

heroic_abilities.effect: Persistent 2: At the start of your turn, you can use a maneuver to use this ability again without spending essence.

heroic_abilities.name: Unquenchable Fire

heroic_abilities.name: Tide of Death

The last target you damage takes extra damage equal to your Might score for each opportunity attack you trigger during your move.

heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + M damage; M < average, bleeding (save ends)

heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + M damage; M < average, bleeding and weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 10 + M damage; M < strong, bleeding and weakened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Make Peace With Your God!

heroic_abilities.name: Thunder Roar

heroic_abilities.name: Special Delivery

heroic_abilities.name: Wrecking Ball
heroic_abilities.effect: You move up to your speed in a straight line. During this movement, you can move through mundane structures, including walls, which are difficult terrain for you. You automatically destroy each square of structure you move through and leave behind a square of difficult terrain. Additionally, you make one power roll that targets each enemy you move adjacent to during this movement.

heroic_abilities.name: Death ... Death!
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + M damage; P < weak, dazed and frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + M damage; P < average, dazed and frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 8 + M damage; P < strong, dazed and frightened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.tier1: 4 + M damage; I < weak, slowed (save ends)

heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 damage; push 2; M < average, dazed (save ends)

heroic_abilities.tier3: 20 + M damage; M < strong, slowed (save ends)

heroic_abilities.tier3: 10 + M damage; P < strong, frightened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Primordial Rage

Additionally, whenever you gain ferocity from taking damage, the source of the damage takes 5 damage of the chosen type.

heroic_abilities.tier2: Any target whose Stamina is equal to or less than 11 dies.
heroic_abilities.tier3: Any target whose Stamina is equal to or less than 17 dies.

Then make one power roll that targets each enemy you move adjacent to during this shift. You gain 1 ferocity for each target who dies as a result of this ability (maximum 11 ferocity).

heroic_abilities.name: Death Comes for You All!

heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 psychic damage; minions reduced to 0, one winded non-leader/solo reduced to 0
heroic_abilities.tier3: 10 psychic damage; each non-leader/solo is winded; minions and one winded non-leader/solo reduced to 0

signature_abilities.name: Inertial Step

signature_abilities.name: Phase Inversion Strike

signature_abilities.tier3: 9 + A damage; A < strong, weakened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Stunning Blow

heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + A damage; I < average, dazed and slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 7 + A damage; I < strong, dazed and slowed (save ends)

heroic_abilities.tier2: 12 + A psychic damage; M < average, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 16 + A psychic damage; M < strong, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: While weakened, target takes damage equal to Intuition whenever they use a supernatural ability that costs Malice.

heroic_abilities.name: Impart Force
heroic_abilities.effect: Object must be your size or smaller. You gain an edge. For each square pushed, target takes 1 psychic damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Phase Strike
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + A psychic damage; I < weak, the target goes out of phase (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 4 + A psychic damage; I < average, the target goes out of phase (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 6 + A psychic damage; I < strong, the target goes out of phase (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: Out of phase: slowed, stability reduced by 2, can't obtain tier 3 on ability rolls.

heroic_abilities.effect: You can take the Disengage move action as a free maneuver before or after you use this ability.

heroic_abilities.name: Entropic Field

heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 cold damage; A < strong, slowed (save ends)

Each ally who enters the area for the first time in a combat round or starts their turn there gains temporary Stamina equal to your Intuition score.

heroic_abilities.name: Stabilizing Field
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, the size of your Null Field ability increases by 1. Each ally in the area also gains these benefits.

heroic_abilities.name: Synapse Field
heroic_abilities.effect: Until end of encounter, Null Field size increases by 1. Whenever an enemy in area takes rolled damage, they take extra psychic damage equal to twice Intuition.

heroic_abilities.name: Anticipating Strike

heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 + A damage; I < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 + A damage; I < strong, restrained (save ends)

Additionally, if your Null Field ability is active, your afterimage also projects the aura from that ability, which you control as if you were in the afterimage's space.

heroic_abilities.tier2: 11 + I cold damage; M < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 15 + I cold damage; M < strong, restrained (save ends)

heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: Another creature damages you. You take half the damage, negate any effects, and gain 3 surges.

heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 + A psychic damage; I < average, dazed
heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 + A psychic damage; I < strong, dazed
heroic_abilities.effect: While dazed, takes psychic damage equal to twice Intuition at start of each of your turns. Non-leader/solo winded: reduced to 0 Stamina. Creature reduced to 0 is forgotten by all creatures of your level or lower.

signature_abilities.name: Gasping in Pain
signature_abilities.effect: One ally within 5 squares of the target gains 1 surge.

signature_abilities.name: I Work Better Alone
signature_abilities.effect: If the target has none of your allies adjacent to them, you gain 1 surge before making the power roll.

signature_abilities.name: Teamwork Has Its Place
signature_abilities.effect: If any ally is adjacent to the target, you gain 1 surge before making the power roll.

signature_abilities.name: You Were Watching the Wrong One
signature_abilities.effect: If you have 1+ allies within 5 squares of target, gain 1 surge. If flanking, choose one flanking ally who also gains 1 surge.

heroic_abilities.name: Disorienting Strike
heroic_abilities.effect: You can shift into any square the target leaves when you slide them.

heroic_abilities.name: Eviscerate
heroic_abilities.tier1: 4 + A damage; A < weak, bleeding (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + A damage; A < average, bleeding (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 10 + A damage; A < strong, bleeding (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Get In Get Out
heroic_abilities.effect: You can shift up to your speed, dividing that movement before or after your strike as desired.

heroic_abilities.name: One Hundred Throats
heroic_abilities.effect: Shift up to your speed, power roll targets up to three enemies who came adjacent to you during the move.

heroic_abilities.name: Setup
heroic_abilities.tier1: 6 + A damage; R < weak, damage weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + A damage; R < average, damage weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 13 + A damage; R < strong, damage weakness 5 (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Shadowstrike
heroic_abilities.effect: You use a strike signature ability twice.

heroic_abilities.name: In a Puff of Ash
heroic_abilities.tier1: 6 + A damage; you can teleport the target 1 square
heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 + A damage; you can teleport the target up to 3 squares
heroic_abilities.tier3: 14 + A damage; you can teleport the target up to 5 squares

heroic_abilities.name: Too Slow
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: You use your In All This Confusion ability. Effect: You ignore any effects associated with the damage that triggered your In All This Confusion ability. Before you teleport, you can make a free strike against a creature who damaged you to trigger In All This Confusion. After you teleport, you can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Sticky Bomb
heroic_abilities.effect: You attach a small bomb to a creature. If you are hidden from the creature, they don't notice the bomb and you remain hidden. The creature otherwise notices the bomb and can disarm and remove it as a main action. If they don't, at the end of your next turn, the bomb detonates. When the bomb detonates, you make a power roll targeting each enemy within 2 squares of it.

heroic_abilities.name: Stink Bomb
heroic_abilities.effect: Gas remains until end of encounter. Any creature starting turn there with M < average is weakened (save ends).

heroic_abilities.name: Machinations of Sound
heroic_abilities.effect: Forced movement ignores stability. Instead, reduced by target's Intuition score.

heroic_abilities.name: So Gullible
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: Another creature targets you with a strike. Use Clever Trick for free. Teleport within 3 squares, make free strike, spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Dancer
heroic_abilities.effect: Until end of encounter, whenever an enemy moves/is force moved adjacent to you or damages you, you can Disengage as a free triggered action.

heroic_abilities.name: Misdirecting Strike
heroic_abilities.effect: The target is taunted by a willing ally within 5 squares until end of target's next turn.

heroic_abilities.name: Pinning Shot
heroic_abilities.tier1: 8 + A damage; A < weak, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 12 + A damage; A < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 16 + A damage; A < strong, restrained (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Staggering Blow
heroic_abilities.tier1: 7 + A damage; M < weak, slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 11 + A damage; M < average, prone and can't stand (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 16 + A damage; M < strong, prone and can't stand (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Blackout
heroic_abilities.effect: A black cloud fills the area until the end of your next turn, granting you and your allies concealment against enemies. While you are in the area, whenever an enemy ends their turn in the area, you can use a free triggered action to shift to a new location within the area and make a free strike against them.

heroic_abilities.name: Into the Shadows
heroic_abilities.effect: You and target removed from encounter map until start of next turn. Reappear in spaces you left. Power roll upon return.

heroic_abilities.name: Shadowfall
heroic_abilities.effect: You disappear before power roll. After resolved, appear at far end of line.

heroic_abilities.name: You Talk Too Much
heroic_abilities.tier1: 10 + A damage; P < weak, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 15 + A damage; P < average, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 21 + A damage; P < strong, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: The target can't communicate with anyone until the end of the encounter.

heroic_abilities.name: Assassinate
heroic_abilities.effect: A non-minion, non-leader, non-solo target who is winded after this damage is reduced to 0 Stamina.

heroic_abilities.name: Shadowgrasp
heroic_abilities.tier1: 11 corruption damage; A < weak, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 16 corruption damage; A < average, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 21 corruption damage; A < strong, restrained (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Speed of Shadows
heroic_abilities.effect: Use a strike signature ability four times, OR three times with edge, OR twice with double edge. Shift up to 2 squares between each use.

heroic_abilities.name: Black Ash Eruption
heroic_abilities.flavor: Your attack produces a cloud of black ash that launches an enemy into the air.
heroic_abilities.effect: A creature force moved by this ability must be moved straight upward.

heroic_abilities.name: Cinderstorm
heroic_abilities.flavor: You teleport your friends in a burst of ash and fire.
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can teleport up to 5 squares. For each target in addition to you who teleports away from or into a space adjacent to an enemy, that enemy takes fire damage equal to your Agility score. Additionally, a target who ends this movement in concealment or cover can use the Hide maneuver even if they are observed.

heroic_abilities.name: One Vial Makes You Better
heroic_abilities.flavor: A well-timed throw of a potion will keep your allies in the fight.
heroic_abilities.effect: You ready, hand, or lob a potion to each target, who can immediately quaff the potion (no action required). If they don't drink the potion right away, they must use the Use Consumable maneuver to consume it later. The potion loses its potency at the end of the encounter. A creature who drinks the potion can spend up to 2 Recoveries, and has acid immunity, fire immunity, or poison immunity (their choice) equal to your level until the end of the encounter.

heroic_abilities.name: One Vial Makes You Faster
heroic_abilities.flavor: Each ally who catches a potion you throw can take the battle to the next level.

power_roll.tier1: The creature's speed is increased by 2 until the end of the encounter.
power_roll.tier2: The creature can fly until the end of the encounter.
power_roll.tier3: The creature turns invisible until the end of their next turn.

heroic_abilities.effect: You ready, hand, or lob a potion to each target, who can immediately quaff the potion (no action required). If they don't drink the potion right away, they must use the Use Consumable maneuver to consume it later. The potion loses its potency at the end of the encounter. A creature who drinks the potion receives benefits based on your power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Look!
heroic_abilities.flavor: You distract your foes, allowing your allies to take advantage of that distraction.
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, any ability roll made against a target gains an edge.

heroic_abilities.name: Puppet Strings
heroic_abilities.flavor: You prick little needles on the tips of your fingers into the nerves of your enemies and cause them to lose control.

power_roll.tier1: 2 damage; if the target has R < weak, before the damage is resolved, they make a free strike.
power_roll.tier2: 5 damage; if the target has R < average, before the damage is resolved, they use a main action ability of your choice.
power_roll.tier3: 7 damage; if the target has R < strong, before the damage is resolved, they can shift up to their speed and use a main action ability of your choice.

heroic_abilities.effect: You choose the new targets for the original target's free strike or ability. Additionally, if you are hidden or disguised, using this ability doesn't cause you to be revealed.

heroic_abilities.name: Cacophony of Cinders
heroic_abilities.flavor: You tumble through the battle, stabbing foes and teleporting allies.

power_roll.tier1: An enemy takes 6 damage; an ally can teleport up to 3 squares.
power_roll.tier2: An enemy takes 10 damage; an ally can teleport up to 5 squares.
power_roll.tier3: An enemy takes 14 damage; an ally can teleport up to 7 squares.

heroic_abilities.effect: You shift up to twice your speed, making one power roll that targets each creature you come adjacent to during the shift.

heroic_abilities.name: Demon Door
heroic_abilities.flavor: You create a temporary portal to allow a massive demonic hand to reach through.
heroic_abilities.effect: On a critical hit, the target is grabbed by the demon and pulled through the portal before it closes, never to be seen again.

heroic_abilities.name: Chain Reaction
heroic_abilities.flavor: One explosion, an offense. Three explosions, an assault. Nine explosions, a celebration.
heroic_abilities.effect: Each enemy within 3 squares of the target who is not currently targeted by this ability also becomes targeted by this ability. This effect continues until there are no more available targets. The ability deals acid, fire, or poison damage (your choice).

heroic_abilities.name: To the Stars
heroic_abilities.flavor: You attach your most potent explosive to your foe. Under less pressing circumstances, you're sure you could launch them into orbit.
heroic_abilities.effect: The ground beneath a 3-cube area around the target's starting position is difficult terrain.

heroic_abilities.name: I Am You
heroic_abilities.flavor: Your mask reflects your foe's face. Surely they won't need it much longer.
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the end of the encounter, you gain the target's damage immunities and speed (if they are better than yours), and can use any types of movement they can use. You can also use the target's signature ability, using their bonus for the power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: It Was Me All Along
heroic_abilities.flavor: After everything you've been through together, you twist the blade and make the pain extra personal.
heroic_abilities.effect: If you are disguised as a creature the target knew using your I'm No Threat ability, this ability deals extra damage equal to three times your Agility score.

tactician.note: Tactician uses two kits from Field Arsenal. Signature abilities come from kits.

heroic_abilities.name: Concussive Strike
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + M damage; M < weak, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + M damage; M < average, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 8 + M damage; M < strong, dazed (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Inspiring Strike
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + M damage; you or one ally within 10 can spend a Recovery
heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + M damage; you or one ally within 10 can spend a Recovery
heroic_abilities.tier3: 8 + M damage; you and one ally within 10 can spend a Recovery, and each gains an edge on next ability roll

heroic_abilities.name: Squad! Forward!
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can move up to their speed.

heroic_abilities.name: Hammer and Anvil
heroic_abilities.tier1: 5 + M damage; one ally within 10 can use a strike signature ability against the target
heroic_abilities.tier2: 9 + M damage; one ally can use a strike signature ability with edge against target
heroic_abilities.tier3: 12 + M damage; two allies can each use a strike signature ability with edge against target
heroic_abilities.effect: If target is reduced to 0 Stamina before ally strikes, ally can pick a different target.

heroic_abilities.name: Mind Game
heroic_abilities.tier1: 4 + M damage; R < weak, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + M damage; R < average, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 10 + M damage; R < strong, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: You mark the target. Before your next turn, first time any ally damages a marked target, that ally can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Now!
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can make a free strike.

heroic_abilities.name: This Is What We Planned For
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target who hasn't acted yet this combat round can take their turn in any order immediately after yours.

heroic_abilities.name: Frontal Assault
heroic_abilities.effect: Until end of encounter or dying, first time per turn you/ally deals damage to a marked target, pusher can push 2 and shift 2. Allies charging a marked target can use melee strike signature/heroic instead of free strike.

heroic_abilities.name: Hit 'Em Hard!
heroic_abilities.effect: Until end of encounter or dying, whenever you/ally deals damage to a marked target, that creature gains 2 surges to use immediately.

heroic_abilities.name: Rout
heroic_abilities.effect: Until end of encounter or dying, whenever you/ally deals damage to a marked target who has R < average, the target is frightened of the damage dealer (save ends).

heroic_abilities.name: Stay Strong and Focus!
heroic_abilities.effect: Until end of encounter or dying, whenever you/ally deals damage to a marked target, the damage dealer can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Squad! Gear Check!
heroic_abilities.effect: You and each ally adjacent to the target gain 10 temporary Stamina.

heroic_abilities.name: Squad! Remember Your Training!
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target gains 1 surge and can use a signature ability that has a double edge.

heroic_abilities.name: Win This Day!
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target gains 2 surges. Additionally, they can spend a Recovery, remove any conditions or effects, and stand up if prone.

heroic_abilities.name: You've Still Got Something Left
heroic_abilities.effect: The target uses a heroic ability with the Strike keyword, deals extra damage equal to your Reason score. Heroic Resource cost reduced by 1 + Reason (min 0).

heroic_abilities.name: Go Now and Speed Well
heroic_abilities.effect: Target gains 2 surges and can use a signature or heroic ability with double edge, ignoring damage immunity, and increasing potency by 1.

heroic_abilities.name: Finish Them!
heroic_abilities.effect: Trigger: The target (non-leader/solo) becomes winded. Effect: The target is killed. The creature who caused the winding can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Floodgates Open
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target gains 1 surge and can use a signature ability with edge and increased potency by 1.

heroic_abilities.name: I'll Open and You'll Close
heroic_abilities.effect: One ally within 10 squares of you can use a heroic ability against the target as a free triggered action without spending any of their Heroic Resource, as long as they have enough Heroic Resource to pay for the ability. If the target is reduced to 0 Stamina before the chosen ally has used their ability, the ally can pick a different target.

heroic_abilities.name: Coordinated Execution
heroic_abilities.flavor: You direct your ally to make a killing blow.
heroic_abilities.trigger: The target uses an ability to deal rolled damage to a creature while hidden.
heroic_abilities.effect: If the target of the triggering ability is not a leader or solo creature, they are reduced to 0 Stamina. If the target of the triggering ability is a minion, the entire squad is killed. If the target of the triggering ability is a leader or solo creature, the triggering ability's power roll automatically obtains a tier 3 outcome.

heroic_abilities.name: Panic in Their Lines
heroic_abilities.flavor: You confuse your foes, causing them to turn on each other.
heroic_abilities.effect: If a target is force moved into another creature, they must make a free strike against that creature.

heroic_abilities.name: Battle Plan
heroic_abilities.flavor: With new understanding of your foes, you create the perfect plan to win the battle.
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target is marked by you. Immediately and until the end of the encounter, the Director tells you if any creatures marked by you have damage immunity or weakness and the value of that immunity or weakness. Additionally, you and each ally within 3 squares of you gains 2 surges.
heroic_abilities.mark_benefit: Until the end of the encounter, whenever you or any ally makes a strike against a creature marked by you, you can spend 2 focus to make the strike ignore damage immunity and deal extra damage equal to three times your Reason score.

heroic_abilities.name: Hustle!
heroic_abilities.flavor: You and your allies coordinate to form a new battle line.
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: You mark two enemies within 10 squares of you. Each target can shift up to their speed. You and each target gain 2 surges.

heroic_abilities.name: Instant Retaliation
heroic_abilities.flavor: You parry with almost supernatural speed.
heroic_abilities.trigger: A creature deals damage to the target.
heroic_abilities.effect: The target takes half the damage. You then make a power roll against the triggering creature.

heroic_abilities.name: To Me Squad!
heroic_abilities.flavor: You lead your allies in a charge.

power_roll.tier1: 6 + M damage; one ally within 10 squares can use the Charge main action as a free triggered action, and can use a melee strike signature ability instead of a free strike for the charge
power_roll.tier2: 9 + M damage; one ally within 10 squares can use the Charge main action as a free triggered action, and can use a melee strike signature ability that gains an edge instead of a free strike for the charge
power_roll.tier3: 13 + M damage; two allies within 10 squares can use the Charge main action as a free triggered action, and can each use a melee strike signature ability that gains an edge instead of a free strike for the charge

heroic_abilities.effect: If the target is hit with two or more strikes as part of this ability and they have R < strong, they are dazed (save ends). If the target is reduced to 0 Stamina before one or both allies has made their strike, the ally or allies can pick a different target.

heroic_abilities.name: Squad! Hit and Run!
heroic_abilities.flavor: I had to pry this secret from the shadow colleges.
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target gains 2 surges, and can use a free triggered action to use a signature ability that gains an edge. After resolving their ability, each target can shift up to 2 squares and become hidden even if they have no cover or concealment, or if they are observed.

heroic_abilities.name: Their Lack of Focus Is Their Undoing
heroic_abilities.flavor: You trick your enemies into attacking each other and leave them confused by the aftermath.
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target uses a signature ability against one or more targets of your choosing, with each ability automatically obtaining a tier 3 outcome on the power roll. After resolving the targets' abilities, you make a power roll against each original target.

heroic_abilities.name: Blot Out the Sun!
heroic_abilities.flavor: What makes a good soldier? The ability to fire four shots a minute in any weather.
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target can make a ranged free strike that gains an edge against any enemy marked by you within distance of their ranged free strike. A target ignores banes and double banes when making this strike.

heroic_abilities.name: Counterstrategy
heroic_abilities.flavor: I've identified a way to negate their strengths.
heroic_abilities.effect: You gain 6 surges. Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, whenever the Director spends Malice (see Draw Steel: Monsters), choose yourself or one ally within 10 squares. The chosen character gains 2 of their Heroic Resource.

heroic_abilities.name: No Escape
heroic_abilities.flavor: Nothing will stop you from reaching your foe.
heroic_abilities.effect: You mark the target. If you use this ability as part of the Charge main action, enemies' spaces don't count as difficult terrain for your movement. Additionally, if you move through any creature's space, you can slide that creature 1 square out of the path of your charge.

heroic_abilities.name: That One Is Mine!
heroic_abilities.flavor: You focus on making an enemy irrelevant.
heroic_abilities.effect: The target is marked by you. Until the end of the encounter or until you are dying, you can use a signature or heroic ability instead of a free strike against any target marked by you.

heroic_abilities.name: Fog of War
heroic_abilities.flavor: Your unorthodox strategy causes enemies to lash out in fear, heedless of who they might be attacking.
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target is marked by you, and must immediately make a free strike against a creature of your choice within 5 squares of them.
heroic_abilities.mark_benefit: Until the end of the encounter, whenever you or any ally makes a strike against a creature marked by you, you can spend 2 focus to force that target to make a free strike against a creature of your choice within 5 squares of them.

heroic_abilities.name: Try Me Instead
heroic_abilities.flavor: "Try picking on someone my size."

power_roll.tier1: 2 + R damage; R < weak, frightened (save ends)
power_roll.tier2: 3 + R damage; R < average, frightened (save ends)
power_roll.tier3: 4 + R damage; R < strong, frightened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.effect: You shift up to your speed directly toward an ally, ending adjacent to them, then swapping locations with that ally as long as you can fit into each other's spaces. The ally can spend a Recovery, and you can make the following weapon strike with a distance of melee 1 against a creature.

heroic_abilities.name: I've Got Your Back
heroic_abilities.flavor: Your enemy will think twice about attacking your friend.
heroic_abilities.effect: One ally adjacent to the target can spend a Recovery.

heroic_abilities.name: Targets of Opportunity
heroic_abilities.flavor: You point out easy targets to your friends, allowing them to include more enemies in their attacks.
heroic_abilities.effect: Each target is marked by you, and you gain two surges.
heroic_abilities.mark_benefit: Until the end of the encounter, whenever you or any ally makes a strike against a creature marked by you, you can spend 2 focus to add one additional target to the strike.

heroic_abilities.name: No Dying on My Watch
heroic_abilities.flavor: You prioritize saving an ally over your own safety.
heroic_abilities.trigger: The target deals damage to an ally.

power_roll.tier1: R < weak, the target is frightened of the triggering ally (save ends)
power_roll.tier2: R < average, the target is frightened of the triggering ally (save ends)
power_roll.tier3: R < strong, the target is frightened of the triggering ally (save ends)

heroic_abilities.effect: You move up to your speed toward the triggering ally, ending this movement adjacent to them or in the nearest square if you can't reach an adjacent square. The triggering ally can spend a Recovery and gains 5 temporary Stamina for each enemy you came adjacent to during the move. You then make a power roll against the target.

heroic_abilities.name: Squad! On Me!
heroic_abilities.flavor: Together we are invincible!
heroic_abilities.target: Self and each ally in the area
heroic_abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each target has a bonus to stability equal to your Might score. Additionally, each target gains 2 surges.

signature_abilities.name: Entropic Bolt
signature_abilities.tier1: 2 + P corruption damage; P < weak, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.tier2: 3 + P corruption damage; P < average, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.tier3: 5 + P corruption damage; P < strong, slowed (save ends)
signature_abilities.effect: Extra 1 corruption damage per additional targeting this encounter. Strained: Gain 1 clarity on tier 2 or 3.

signature_abilities.name: Hoarfrost
signature_abilities.tier1: 2 + R cold damage; M < weak, slowed (EoT)
signature_abilities.tier2: 4 + R cold damage; M < average, slowed (EoT)
signature_abilities.tier3: 6 + R cold damage; M < strong, slowed (EoT)
signature_abilities.effect: Strained: You are slowed until end of next turn. Slowed target is restrained instead.

signature_abilities.name: Incinerate
signature_abilities.effect: Column of fire remains until start of next turn. Enemies entering or starting turn take 2 fire damage. Strained: cube increases by 2, fire disappears at end of turn.

signature_abilities.name: Kinetic Grip
signature_abilities.effect: Strained: You must vertical push the target instead of sliding them.

signature_abilities.name: Kinetic Pulse
signature_abilities.effect: Strained: burst size increases by 2, you are bleeding until start of next turn.

signature_abilities.name: Materialize
signature_abilities.effect: A size 1M object drops onto the target, then rolls into adjacent space. Strained: object explodes, each adjacent creature takes Reason score damage (including you, can't be reduced).

signature_abilities.name: Optic Blast
signature_abilities.effect: When targeting reflective object/creature, can target one additional creature within 3 squares. Strained: gain 1 surge (immediate), take Reason score damage (can't reduce).

signature_abilities.name: Spirit Sword
signature_abilities.effect: You gain 1 surge. Strained: target takes extra 3 damage, you take 3 damage (can't reduce).

heroic_abilities.name: Awe
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + P psychic damage; I < weak, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + P psychic damage; I < average, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 9 + P psychic damage; I < strong, frightened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: If ally target: temporary Stamina equal to 3x Presence, end one effect. If enemy: power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Choke
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + R damage; M < weak, slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + R damage; M < average, slowed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 8 + R damage; M < strong, restrained (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: You can vertical pull the target up to 2 squares. If restrained by this ability, forced movement ignores stability.

heroic_abilities.name: Precognition
heroic_abilities.effect: Ability rolls against the target take a bane until start of your next turn. Target can make a free strike against source of damage when they take damage.

heroic_abilities.name: Smolder
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + R damage; R < weak, weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 6 + R damage; R < average, weakness 5 (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 9 + R damage; R < strong, weakness equal to 5 + Reason (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: Choose damage type and weakness from: acid, corruption, or fire. Target takes damage before weakness applied.

heroic_abilities.name: Flashback
heroic_abilities.effect: Target uses an ability with base cost 7 or lower previously used this round without spending the base cost. Strained: 1d6 damage and slowed (save ends).

heroic_abilities.name: Inertia Soak
heroic_abilities.effect: Target ignores difficult terrain and takes no forced movement damage until start of next turn. Can push adjacent creatures up to Reason score squares. Strained: weakened (save ends), forced movement gains +5.

heroic_abilities.name: Iron
heroic_abilities.effect: Stability increases by Reason, gain 10 temp Stamina and 2 surges. Stability lasts until no temp Stamina from this. Strained: can't use maneuvers (save ends).

heroic_abilities.name: Perfect Clarity
heroic_abilities.effect: +3 speed, double edge on next power roll. If tier 3, gain 1 clarity. Strained: 1d6 damage, can't use triggered actions (save ends).

heroic_abilities.name: Fling Through Time
heroic_abilities.tier1: 3 + P corruption damage; P < weak, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 5 + P corruption damage; target flung through time, if P < average weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 8 + P corruption damage; target flung through time, if P < strong weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: A target who is flung through time is removed from the encounter map until the end of their next turn, reappearing in their original space or the nearest unoccupied space. Strained: You take 2d6 damage and permanently grow visibly older (the equivalent of 10 years for a human). If you obtain a tier 3 outcome on the power roll, you gain 2 clarity.

heroic_abilities.name: Force Orbs
heroic_abilities.effect: Create three size 1T orbs orbiting you. Each gives cumulative damage immunity 1. Lose 1 orb per damage taken. Free maneuver to fire one at creature within 5. Strained: five orbs, weakened while any active.

heroic_abilities.name: Reflector Field
heroic_abilities.effect: Lasts until start of next turn. Enemies' ranged abilities against allies in area are negated and reflected at half damage. Strained: aura size +1, 2d6 damage and forget a memory each reflection.

heroic_abilities.name: Soul Burn
heroic_abilities.tier1: 6 + P damage; P < weak, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 10 + P damage; P < average, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier3: 14 + P damage; P < strong, dazed (save ends)
heroic_abilities.effect: Target takes bane on Presence tests until end of encounter. Strained: potency +1, 2d6 damage and 3 surges.

heroic_abilities.name: Doubt
heroic_abilities.tier1: 10 + P damage; P < weak, weakened (save ends)
heroic_abilities.tier2: 14 + P damage; P < average, weakened (save ends)

heroic_abilities.name: Fulcrum
heroic_abilities.flavor: You precisely manipulate the creatures around you.

heroic_abilities.flavor: No, no. You don't die until the sequel.

power_roll.tier2: You and the target can end any effects on yourselves that are ended by a saving throw or that end at the end of your turns.

heroic_abilities.effect: Add your current Stamina to your target's current Stamina, then you have half that total Stamina and the target has the remainder. Neither of you can gain more Stamina than your maximum this way. You then make a power roll.

heroic_abilities.name: Jam Session

heroic_abilities.name: Twist at the End

heroic_abilities.name: Summoner's Sword
